entries.summary: Current-packages release (WP-B1): sdk ^0.6.1 / react ^0.2.0 pins (0.3.0 encodings are rejected by the deployed program — bump immediately); post-hire activation wired into the hire flow (useHumanlessHireFlow + the store activation route, zero moderation config); provider-level referrer injection (settlement live); operator terms on listing creation; agent-card unified to agenc.agentCard.v1; mainnet gate re-copy + go-live checklist.
Initial store-core: config schema (defineStore), SEO helpers, shared page sections, instance-upgrade primitives, and the local sandbox bootstrap.
